batch_summary: Deed [322] is an Oil, Gas and Mineral Lease from Olena Bounds Black (widow, dealing with her separate property) to Ell McComb, dated June 18, 1979, covering 491.99 acres across J. Strickland A-550, B. Slaughter A-565, and W. Curry A-9 in Freestone County — the identical nine sub-tracts appearing in Exhibit A of deeds [14] and [21]. CRITICAL FINDING: This instrument is recorded at FC Deed Record 534, Page 321 — the same citation that ISSUE-46 and ISSUE-43 item 24 identified from CAD deed histories as the upstream source deed bringing ~492 acres to Olena. It is NOT a conveyance deed — the CAD system misidentified a lease as a title transfer. The actual upstream source deed to Olena remains unidentified. ISSUE-46 remains OPEN with redirected research. The lease confirms Olena held these tracts as separate property, documents all nine J.M. Bounds source deeds by volume/page, excludes coal and lignite from the leased minerals, and is a correction of an earlier defective McComb lease. Notarized by Margaret Dickens in McLennan County (same notary as deed [321]). Five-year primary term (expired June 1984).

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [322] added to Phase 3 — Oil, Gas and Mineral Lease, Olena Bounds Black (widow) → Ell McComb (FC DR/534/321-323, Doc# 4450, 1979); CRITICAL: FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 identified as OGL, not conveyance deed — ISSUE-46 upstream source deed for ~492 ac Exhibit A block remains unidentified; CAD deed histories misidentified lease as title transfer

operations.description: Add deed [322] entry to Phase 3 body as entry 2a, after deed [05]/[23] and before deed [07] (chronological order: Oct 1972 → Jun 1979 → Dec 1979)
operations.content: 2a. `1979-06-18_[322]_f` — Olena Bounds Black, a widow dealing with her separate property → Ell McComb (oil, gas and mineral lease, Freestone) — **491.99 acres total** across 9 tracts: **First Tract** 200.0 ac J. Strickland A-550 (source: C.C. Ballard et ux→J.M. Bounds 11/7/1908 Vol.31 p.182 FC); **Second Tract** 53.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: Mrs. Martha Cameron→J.M. Bounds 12/15/1912 Vol.47 p.118 FC); **Third Tract** 53.0 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC); **Fourth Tract** 53.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: N. Lunsford et ux→J.M. Bounds 8/20/1890 Vol.2 p.406 FC); **Fifth Tract** 4.5 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC — same source deed as Third Tract); **Sixth Tract** 40.0 ac "S. Slaughter Survey A-565" [sic — B. Slaughter; see ISSUE-27] (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 9/21/1885 Vol.2 p.410 FC); **Seventh Tract** 13.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 3/13/1886 Vol.2 p.408 FC); **Eighth Tract** 50.5 ac W. Curry A-9 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC — same source deed as Third and Fifth Tracts); **Ninth Tract** 24.0 ac W. Curry A-9 (source: N. Lunsford et ux→J.M. Bounds 8/20/1890 Vol.2 p.406 "fo" [sic] FC — same source deed as Fourth Tract). These nine tracts are **identical to Exhibit A** of deeds [14]/[36] and [21]/[40]. Consideration: $10.00 + delay rentals. Primary term: 5 years. **Coal and lignite excluded** (margin note initialed O.B.B.). **Correction lease**: corrects an earlier McComb lease "wherein the word 'years' was omitted from the term of the lease" — earlier defective lease not yet identified. Special condition: no water from ponds or surface water. Pooling: 640-acre provision. JP Black's name struck from printed form (deceased 11/14/1978). Olena's address: Rt. 1 Box 166, Wortham, Texas. Acknowledged June 20, 1979 McLennan County before Margaret A. Dickens NP (comm. exp. 8/31/1980 — same notary as deed [321]). Filed July 9, 1979 at 9:50 AM; recorded July 13, 1979. Doris Terry Welch, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Sue Lambeth. Doc# 4450; Deed Record 534, Pages 321–323 (3 pages). **⚠️ CRITICAL FOR ISSUE-46**: This is the instrument at FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 that CAD deed histories identified as the upstream source deed for ~492 ac — **it is NOT a conveyance; it is an OGL**. The CAD system misidentified the lease as a title transfer. The actual upstream conveyance to Olena remains unidentified. ISSUE-43 item 24 satisfied (pulled) but ISSUE-46 remains OPEN. Phase 3

operations.description: Add coal/lignite exclusion note and upstream source deed citations from deed [322] to the [14]/[36] mineral entry caveat
operations.find: - Caveat: Upstream chain (J.M. Bounds acquisitions 1883–1912) may have mineral severances not visible in this deed; Weaver-type issues cannot be ruled out without reviewing each source deed
operations.replace_with:
- Caveat: Upstream chain (J.M. Bounds acquisitions 1883–1912) may have mineral severances not visible in this deed; Weaver-type issues cannot be ruled out without reviewing each source deed
- **Coal/lignite exclusion**: Deed [322] (1979 McComb OGL, FC DR/534/321) covering the identical 491.99-ac Exhibit A block explicitly excludes coal and lignite from the leased minerals (margin note initialed O.B.B.: "this lease does not cover coal or lignite"). This exclusion applies to the McComb lease only and does NOT sever coal/lignite from the mineral estate — Olena retained all minerals including coal/lignite. However, it establishes that coal/lignite was a separately contemplated mineral interest as of 1979.
- **Upstream J.M. Bounds source deeds** (per deed [322] Exhibit A): Vol.31 p.182 (Ballard→JM Bounds 1908, 200 ac Strickland); Vol.47 p.118 (Cameron→JM Bounds 1912, 53.33 ac Slaughter); Vol.37 p.463 (ST Bounds→JM Bounds 1883, 53+4.5+50.5 ac across Slaughter/Curry); Vol.2 p.406 (Lunsford→JM Bounds 1890, 53.33+24 ac Slaughter/Curry); Vol.2 p.410 (Thompson→JM Bounds 1885, 40 ac Slaughter); Vol.2 p.408 (Thompson→JM Bounds 1886, 13.33 ac Slaughter) — all FC Deed Records. These are descriptive references only ("for descriptive purposes only" per lease text), not chain-of-title incorporations.

05_OPEN_ISSUES.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [322] (FC DR/534/321) — ISSUE-43 item 24 PULLED (OGL, not conveyance); ISSUE-46 SIGNIFICANTLY REVISED (CAD misidentification — upstream source deed for ~492 ac still unidentified); ISSUE-16 research redirected; ISSUE-27 cross-reference added

operations.description: Update ISSUE-46 — major finding: Vol. 534/321 is an OGL not a conveyance deed; CAD misidentified instrument type; upstream source still unknown
operations.find:
**ISSUE-46: Exhibit A Block Upstream Source — FC Vol. 534, Pg. 321**
- **Status**: OPEN
- **Priority**: HIGH
- **County**: Freestone
- **Description**: FC CAD deed histories for 8 parcels (F15750, F16073, F16075, F16077, F3152, F3153, F16074, F17559) all show FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 as the deed bringing land to "BLACK OLENA MRS." This single instrument is the upstream source for the entire Exhibit A block (~329 ac across J. Strickland A-550, B. Slaughter A-565, and W. Curry A-9), plus the 162.99-ac Exhibit B (Trust No. 2). The instrument is in the DR/531–534 volume range, same era as deed [07] (DR/531/500, December 1979) — likely part of the same closing session.
- **Three parcels (F16075, F16077, F16074) also show "BOUNDS J M EST" dated 11-11-1911** as an earlier upstream entry. This is the J.M. Bounds estate instrument for the Slaughter/Curry surveys.
- **Possible identities for Vol. 534/321**: (a) MS Bounds estate → Olena (Olena as executrix, same pattern as [07]); (b) the ISSUE-16 "unknown aunt" deed; (c) another source entirely.
- **Action**: Pull FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 — ISSUE-43 item 24. This one deed resolves the chain for ~492 ac (all Exhibit A + Exhibit B parcels).
- **Also pull**: The J.M. Bounds estate instrument (1911) if a citation can be identified from the FC index. The CAD shows no Vol/Pg for it.
- **Added**: Trust No. 2 / JAB Scope Expansion Session (2026-03-10)
operations.replace_with:
**ISSUE-46: Exhibit A Block Upstream Source — FC Vol. 534, Pg. 321 is OGL, NOT Conveyance — Upstream Source Deed Still Unidentified**
- **Status**: OPEN — **SIGNIFICANTLY REVISED**
- **Priority**: HIGH
- **County**: Freestone
- **Description**: FC CAD deed histories for 8 parcels (F15750, F16073, F16075, F16077, F3152, F3153, F16074, F17559) all show FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 as the deed bringing land to "BLACK OLENA MRS."
- **⚠️ CRITICAL FINDING (2026-03-31)**: FC Vol. 534 Pg. 321 = **deed [322]**, an **Oil, Gas and Mineral Lease** from Olena Bounds Black (widow, separate property) to Ell McComb, dated June 18, 1979. **This is NOT a conveyance deed.** The CAD system misidentified the instrument type — a lease does not transfer fee title. The actual upstream conveyance deed bringing ~492 ac to Olena is STILL UNIDENTIFIED.
- **What deed [322] DOES confirm**: (a) Olena held these 491.99 acres as her **separate property** (not JP Black's, not trust property) as of June 1979; (b) all nine tracts trace to **J.M. Bounds** through specific source deeds with recorded citations (Vol.31 p.182; Vol.47 p.118; Vol.37 p.463; Vol.2 p.406; Vol.2 p.410; Vol.2 p.408 — all FC); (c) the identical 491.99-ac Exhibit A composition is confirmed 26 years before deed [14]; (d) coal and lignite were explicitly excluded from the lease.
- **What deed [322] does NOT resolve**: How did these tracts get from J.M. Bounds (acquisitions 1883–1912) to Olena? The chain gap is: J.M. Bounds → [J.M. Bounds estate, 1911?] → [MS Bounds? Lou Barry Bounds Martin? Unknown?] → Olena. No recorded conveyance to Olena has been identified.
- **Three parcels (F16075, F16077, F16074) also show "BOUNDS J M EST" dated 11-11-1911** as an earlier upstream entry. This is the J.M. Bounds estate instrument for the Slaughter/Curry surveys.
- **Revised research direction**: (a) The upstream conveyance may be UNRECORDED — Olena may have inherited by intestacy from MS Bounds (d. 5/5/1977) without a separate deed, using deed [07] (DR/531/500, 12/13/1979) as the confirmatory quitclaim; (b) deed [07] should be re-examined to determine if its property description covers the Exhibit A tracts or only other MS Bounds estate property; (c) Olena's 2005 probate file (Freestone County) may contain an estate inventory listing the source; (d) search FC index under McComb for the EARLIER defective lease (deed [322] is a correction lease — "the word 'years' was omitted from the term of the lease"); (e) the "BOUNDS J M EST 11-11-1911" CAD entry remains a separate pull target.
- **Also pull**: The J.M. Bounds estate instrument (1911) if a citation can be identified from the FC index. The CAD shows no Vol/Pg for it.
- **Added**: Trust No. 2 / JAB Scope Expansion Session (2026-03-10); **revised 2026-03-31 upon deed [322] analysis**

operations.description: Update ISSUE-16 — redirect research: FC Vol. 534/321 is the McComb OGL, not the unknown source deed; critical lead eliminated
operations.find: - **Status**: OPEN — **SIGNIFICANTLY ADVANCED** — aunt identified; land origin and source deed unknown; FC Vol. 534/321 pull is the key next step. **Deed [323] pulled (2026-03-31)**: Olena's 1984 Affidavit of Heirship (FC DR/665/424, Doc# 3294) establishes heirs of **John Adam Barry** (Olena's maternal uncle, sibling of Mattie Mae and Lou) and wife Ora Barry — does NOT address Lou's land or the source deed question directly, but documents Barry family heirship pattern and confirms Olena was personally acquainted with J. A. Barry and Ora during their lifetimes. Attorney: Benjie Reed (Mexia TX) — same attorney appearing in later Limestone County instruments (deed [329], 2000). The affidavit may have been part of a coordinated 1984 title-clearing effort. **Deed [326] pulled (2026-03-31)**: Heirship Affidavit for Marguerite Bounds (FC OR/938/719, Doc# 4071, filed 8/25/1994). Affiants E. A. Strange Jr and James Black attest to Marguerite Bounds' heirs (d. 4/20/1981, Wortham, FC, age 76): children Hallye Rae Bounds Tyner and Billy Joe Bounds (d. 3/28/1993 Falls Co.); four grandchildren. **No property described** — heirship documentation only; does NOT advance ISSUE-16 (no mention of Lou, Jesse M. Bounds, or any land). Marguerite Bounds' connection to the project Bounds family is not established. The FC index entry "James → Bounds Marguerite" reflected the affiant (James Black) and decedent (Marguerite Bounds) — not a grantor→grantee conveyance. FC Vol. 534/321 remains the key next step.
operations.replace_with: - **Status**: OPEN — **SIGNIFICANTLY ADVANCED** — aunt identified; land origin and source deed unknown. **⚠️ FC Vol. 534/321 CRITICAL LEAD ELIMINATED (2026-03-31)**: Deed [322] analysis confirms Vol. 534 Pg. 321 is the 1979 Olena→McComb OGL, NOT a conveyance deed (see ISSUE-46). The CAD misidentified the instrument type. The actual upstream conveyance bringing ~492 ac to Olena is STILL UNIDENTIFIED. However, deed [322] confirms all nine tracts trace to J.M. Bounds and that Olena held them as separate property — consistent with inheritance from either MS Bounds or Lou Barry Bounds Martin, but does not identify which. **New highest-priority action**: Re-examine deed [07] (FC DR/531/500, Estate of MS Bounds → Olena, 12/13/1979) to determine if it covers the Exhibit A tracts, or search for a separate MS Bounds estate→Olena instrument, or pull Olena's 2005 probate inventory. **Deed [323] pulled (2026-03-31)**: Olena's 1984 Affidavit of Heirship (FC DR/665/424, Doc# 3294) establishes heirs of **John Adam Barry** (Olena's maternal uncle, sibling of Mattie Mae and Lou) and wife Ora Barry — does NOT address Lou's land or the source deed question directly, but documents Barry family heirship pattern and confirms Olena was personally acquainted with J. A. Barry and Ora during their lifetimes. Attorney: Benjie Reed (Mexia TX) — same attorney appearing in later Limestone County instruments (deed [329], 2000). The affidavit may have been part of a coordinated 1984 title-clearing effort. **Deed [326] pulled (2026-03-31)**: Heirship Affidavit for Marguerite Bounds (FC OR/938/719, Doc# 4071, filed 8/25/1994). Affiants E. A. Strange Jr and James Black attest to Marguerite Bounds' heirs (d. 4/20/1981, Wortham, FC, age 76): children Hallye Rae Bounds Tyner and Billy Joe Bounds (d. 3/28/1993 Falls Co.); four grandchildren. **No property described** — heirship documentation only; does NOT advance ISSUE-16. **Deed [322] pulled (2026-03-31)**: OGL at FC DR/534/321 — confirms Olena held the 491.99-ac Exhibit A block as separate property in 1979 and all tracts trace to J.M. Bounds, but does NOT identify the conveyance chain from J.M. Bounds to Olena.
